item.title: Refresh - a comic about burnout
item.description: When I started working from home, I was comfy and happy in my jammies, I got to cook my lunch in my own kitchen, and I got to spend all day with my cat. However, I quickly realized I don't hate people as much as I thought I did and started to spin into a depressive state. I changed jobs, traveled a tiny bit, and things got a lot better. Thus, comic inspiration was born! :) Thanks for reading
item.dc:creator: sleepyheadkl

item.title: Captain Carter Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here, wanted to share these shots from my Captain Carter shoot.
Went out and did these yesterday, pretty stoked about how they turned out.
Kind of a weird cosplay for me to do, I’m more into characters like Catwoman lately. But I’d always wanted to cosplay Captain America, and after seeing Hayley Atwell as Captain Carter in Doctor Strange, I figured it would work.
I wanna weather the spats for next time I wear them, but I’m stoked about the rest of the suit.

item.title: If you are travelling this summer…
item.description:
My friend is a flight attendant. She shared this post on her feed and I wanted to share it with you all.
My husband and I are travelling this summer from Canada to Europe with our niece. Starting to have second thoughts.
If you have any post-COVID travel stories, I’d like to hear them!
Travel safely!

item.dc:creator: MisterRz

item.title: Made a telemarketer hang up on me
item.description: He asked whether I would “please” vote for a GOP candidate this November. I responded “not until there is a candidate that will support a woman’s right to her own reproductive health choices.” This started a 10 minute back and forth with me angrily poking holes in his piss poor forced birth argument, with accompanying sources, and contradicting bible verses which he would then say “that depends on interpretation.” And reminded him several times that politicians serve all religions within their constituency, not just Christians. This is a human rights issue, not a religious one. I shared my own abortion story, married, on birth control, ectopic pregnancy that would have killed me without an abortion. He conceded there should be exceptions if the mother’s life is in jeopardy. So I asked who gets to make that decision? Who decides at exactly what point when the mother is in jeopardy? “Well I’m not a medical expert” EXACTLY I screamed. That’s when I really laid in on him, my son giggling down the hall listening to my rant. The call ended with him saying “well then you shouldn’t have gotten pregnant” and hanging up on me. So I guess fuck me for having marital relations with my husband. ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ To be clear, I support a woman’s right to chose regardless of her reasons. I?DO?NOT ?FUCKING ?CARE?WHY I got him to concede on one exception so I laid in on him with other “exceptions” that he has absolutely no right to make a decision on. I am beyond angry and I am absolutely fucking terrified. I’m angry at my fellow females that support forced birth. I’m angry we aren’t striking nationwide. I’m angry Republicunts have such a wider social media presence and news platforms. I’m angry that all I can do is nothing. Waiting for elections. Waiting for judges to make decisions. Waiting for other women to get as angry as I am. We will do nothing until all of our rights are revoked. I go to sleep angry. I wake up angry. It is on my mind 24/7. OUR BODIES, OUR CHOICE! FP Edit: Thanks for the support guys. For those commenting on my husband, he died in 2017. He became a Trumper shortly before his death, but prior to that, he’d have been super supportive and one of the first to riot and had participated in some before. I miss the man he was. He had a unique sense of humor so I was never sure if he actually believed and supported Trump or if he just enjoyed the ridiculousness of it and was joking just to rile people up.

item.title: Christians love to take things by force
item.description: Just a reminder of how Christianity became so popular today. During the reign of Charlemagne women were impaled on sharpened poles put in the vagina. Slowly over days the pole would travel the length of the body through the organs causing tremendous pain, simply because a woman was found collecting herbs in the forest. She was labeled a witch. Their screams could be heard for days as an example to those who would not accept the foreign faith. Christianity became so popular because of sheer terror of what would happen if it wasn't accepted. And people think the Nazis were horrible. This is still happening today in the form of collective social pressure. Say your a pagan and your immediately labeled dangerous, evil, and a threat to the world.

item.title: The 141st vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump
item.description:
Teachers are underpaid
and underappreciated
Every bad thing that has happened since 5-28-2016 has been because they killed Harambe.
Dis cord
STAY TUNED! *** I started my new job this week, so MeeMay release times may change slightly *** I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu b̶e̶t̶w̶e̶e̶n̶ 1̶1̶a̶m̶ a̶n̶d̶ N̶o̶o̶n̶ E̶S̶T̶, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
As a Minneapolite, yes
I also want to communicate with rabbits. They always run away and I want to pet them.
I'd specifically like to talk to this rabbit
10,000 kilos of it.
Was def. high A.F.
I'm thinking it means eat your GPS.
I'll haunt the shit out of people if there's not at least one fight.
It works
*sus-eyes Alabama*
Sus
Words not shocking to read together: "Dolly Parton will star in", "in Taco Bell's", "streaming May 26 on" "on TikTok" But to read each of those bits together, WTF
PRO FACT / FUN HACK / LIFE TIP: I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones. Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @KirbyVictorious Archive Of Previous Dumps: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Updated Weekly #Dump #Meme_Dump #Phone_Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon
